laws.title: TLS/SSL Certificate
laws.description: Ensure the site uses a valid SSL certificate to encrypt data.
laws.remediation: Regularly check and renew SSL certificates to maintain secure connections.

laws.title: Content Security Policy (CSP)
laws.description: Implement CSP headers to mitigate XSS attacks.
laws.remediation: Define and deploy a robust CSP policy restricting resource loading origins.

laws.title: Subresource Integrity (SRI)
laws.description: Utilize SRI for external scripts and resources to prevent loading tampered files.
laws.remediation: Include integrity checks in script or link tags for critical external resources.

laws.title: HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS)
laws.description: Enforce secure connections by setting HSTS policy.
laws.remediation: Add an HSTS header to enforce HTTPS and prevent man-in-the-middle attacks.

laws.title: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS)
laws.description: Properly configure CORS to control resource sharing across domains.
laws.remediation: Restrict CORS headers to only allow trusted domains, reducing threat surfaces.
